title: The C1 Gauntlet
description: A mixed advanced-level challenge that blends the whole C1 band — inversion for emphasis, cleft sentences, modals of deduction (including past deduction), participle clauses, and discourse markers and cohesion — across the grammar, vocabulary, usage and spelling strands, climbing from a warm-up to a punishing elite trial.
sources: CEFR C1 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Martin Hewings, Advanced Grammar in Use (inversion, cleft sentences, modals of deduction, participle clauses, cohesion devices)
